messages.content:
Make into a script using X: Y and 3 lines.
“Confused help friend. Boom! Mistake, run careful future.”

X: "Hey Y, I think I messed up pretty bad.
Y: "What's going on? Can I help in any way?"
X: "I'm just feeling really confused about everything. I made a huge mistake and now I'm going to have to be really careful in the future. Thanks for offering to help though." *BOOM!*
10 line

X: "I don't know what to do, Y. I'm so confused and lost."
Y: "What's going on? You can talk to me."
X: "I made a terrible mistake and now I don't know how to fix it."
Y: "We'll figure it out together. Whatever it is, it can be solved."
X: *sighs* "Thanks, Y. I just feel like I'm running out of time."
Y: "Take a deep breath and let's come up with a plan. We can make it work."
X: "Okay, I'm going to be more careful in the future. I can't afford to make this mistake again."
Y: "I'll be here to support you every step of the way. You're not alone in this."
X: *BOOM!* "What was that?!"
Y: "It's nothing, don't worry. Let's focus on finding a solution to your problem."
Make X and Y new people

X: "Oh my God, I don't know what to do, Sarah. I'm so confused and lost."

Y: "Talk to me, Mark. What's happening?"

X: "I made such a terrible mistake, and now everything is falling apart."

Y: "Don't worry, Mark. We'll figure it out. Whatever it is, we can solve it together."

X: *heaves a sigh* "I feel like I'm running out of time. I have to fix this before it's too late."

Y: "Take a deep breath. We'll come up with a plan. You don't have to do this alone."

X: "I'll be more careful in the future. I can't afford to let this happen again."

Y: "I'm here for you every step of the way, Mark. Don't forget that."

X: *BOOM!* "What was that?!"

Y: "It's just a car backfiring. Let's focus on solving your problem."
Change the ba

X: "Goodness gracious, I'm at a loss here, Jack. I don't know what to do; it's like my thoughts are scattered."

Y: "Hey now, what's going on? You can tell me, I'm here for you."

X: "I've made a huge blunder and now everything's just going haywire."

Y: "Take a deep breath, we can sort this out together. Remember, every problem has a solution."

X: *sighs deeply* "I just feel like there's a ticking clock, and I'm running out of time to fix what I messed up."

Y: "No one said it would be an easy fix, but we can make a plan - we can work through this."

X: "Okay, going forward, I'm going to double-check everything. I can't afford to mess up like this again."

Y: "No problem, I'll be here for you every step of the way."

X: *LOUD CRASH*. "What in the world was that?"

Y: "It sounded like a car accident, but don't worry about it for now. Let's focus on finding a solution to your problem first."

Y: "Hey now, what's going on? You can tell me, I'm here for you."

X: "Okay, going forward, I'm going to double-check everything. I can't afford to mess up like this again."

Y: "No problem, I'll be here for you every step of the way."

X: *LOUD CRASH*. "What in the world was that?"

Y: "It sounded like a car accident, but don't worry about it for now. Let's focus on finding a solution to your problem first."
